text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Summer camp is already coming to a close...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Perish the thought! I mean, there are so many
exciting things to look forward to!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It appears that many have their eyes on me for
the Shuka Sho. I wonder if it's just because of my
family.
choice_data_list: It's because you're a great runner, of course.
It's because you're a great runner, of course.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting to hear those words. ♪ I truly
hope that's the case.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It certainly wasn't just some sweet talk—she's
improved considerably over the summer. And
there's still room for further improvement.
choice_data_list: Let's stun everyone at the Shuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it will be a grand surprise! Let's knock their
socks off! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You wouldn't think summer camp was over by the
racket you're making.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Take a look around—everyone's beat. You're the
only one who treated camp like a vacation.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You don't seem very beat. I guess that means you
were on vacation too... But we both know that's
not actually the case.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You and I both worked as hard as we could during
camp, and the proof of that hard work is in the
pudding. We've both gotten much better.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ability isn't decided by something as simple as
the effort you put in.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Do you really think so? I, for one, believe in the
value of effort.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Magnificent practice brings splendid results.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ha. You truly are a noble little princess.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You never scream or blow your lid. ...You're
racing to the top as if there's no resistance at all.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I can see it. You're going to produce results that
go beyond anything I first imagined.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Um... thank you? It's rare for you to offer such
genuine praise.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt about it—you'll do well in both
the Shuka Sho and the Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: But that... That's where you peak, Fine.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Don't you forget it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Then you be sure not to miss it, Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I wonder what that was all about?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Well, maybe I should simply enjoy the praise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Based on Air Shakur's previous behavior, I can't
imagine it was just simple praise... but Fine
Motion appears to have taken it at face value.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, that's how our eventful summer camp
comes to a close.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...That's your peak. In other words, it's only
downhill from there.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And you won't even struggle to go higher. What a
cruel fate.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You'd have been better off if you never had any
running talent to begin with.
